chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petitions No. D- 3421 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) 1. For order of Misc. No.14400 of 2021 (U/A). 2. For order on office objection no. 18 & 27. 3. For order of Misc. No.14401 of 2021 (Exemption). 4. For order of Misc. No.14402 of 2021 (Stay). 5. For order on Misc. No.14409 of 2021 (U/s 151). 6. For hearing of main case. 31.5.2021 Mr. Bisharat Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioner. ----------------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with within one week’s time. 3. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-6. The instant petition has been filed by the petitioner primarily on the ground that the respondent- Industrial Development Bank Limited (‘IDBL’) is not considering him for promotion to the next rank and in the meanwhile State Bank of Pakistan is going to wind up the IDBL and has initiated the winding-up proceedings and the petitioner and others moved an application under Order 1 Rule 10 CPC in the aforesaid proceedings for joining them as one of the respondents, the same was withdrawn as not pressed for redressal of his grievance by approaching this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Learned counsel further argued that the petitioner is eligible and fit to be considered for promotion along with ancillary benefits before its winding-up process. Learned counsel prayed for a direction to respondent No.1 to consider his case for promotion before his retirement date which is due within two months. Learned counsel referred to various documents attached with the memo of the petition and argued that a learned Single Judge vide order dated 06.05.2021 in JCM No.29 of 2019 has already taken on record the reference filed by the learned Official Assignee and the matter is still subjudice, however, he assisted that still he has a cause of action to approach this Court for direction to the respondent-IDBL for relief(s) as prayed.

Learned counsel prayed for a direction to respondent No.1 to consider his case for promotion before his retirement date which is due within two months. Learned counsel referred to various documents attached with the memo of the petition and argued that a learned Single Judge vide order dated 06.05.2021 in JCM No.29 of 2019 has already taken on record the reference filed by the learned Official Assignee and the matter is still subjudice, however, he assisted that still he has a cause of action to approach this Court for direction to the respondent-IDBL for relief(s) as prayed. Learned counsel is directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition in the light of proceedings initiated in JCM No.29 of 2019 on the next date of hearing. Adjourned to a date in office. J U D G E J U D G E Nadir*
